title: AI Won’t Replace Leaders and It Will Amplify Them
author: Low Hang Wei
text:
Member-only story
AI Won’t Replace Leaders and It Will Amplify Them
In the age of intelligent tools, the real differentiator is how we lead when answers are everywhere.
A few years ago, leadership advantage came from information.
You knew more.
You had more experience.
You’d “seen this before.”
Today, that edge is shrinking.
Because now, everyone has access to insight, analysis, and recommendations in seconds.
AI didn’t just change how we work.
It quietly changed what leadership is.
The End of Information Advantage
When answers are scarce, authority comes from knowledge.
When answers are abundant, authority comes from judgement.
Your team no longer needs you to have the answers.
They need you to decide which answers matter.
And that shift is uncomfortable for many leaders because it moves leadership away from certainty and towards clarity.
